title: Scotch Egg with Mustardy Sauce
description: A classic scotch egg recipe with a twist of mustardy sauce, perfect for a quick snack.
instructions: 1. In a pan, cook the lamb mince over medium heat, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned.
2. Add the chopped tasty and cook for 1-2 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and let cool.
4. Wrap each scotch egg in the cooled lamb mixture.
5. Chill in the fridge for at least 30 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, mix the mustard and mayonnaise in a bowl.
7. Serve the scotch egg with the mustardy sauce.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
